series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of applications, renewal forms or correspondence associated with an application or renewal form for a real estate salesperson license or real estate brokers license. This retention schedule also includes, but is not limited to, ancillary trustee appointment applications, name reservation applications, corporation applications, branch office applications, partnership applications, limited liability company applications, association applications, consent to service of process forms and trust/special account change forms. These records may contain social security numbers which are not a matter of public record for purposes of Ohio Revised Code Section 149.03.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper copy is imaged and indexed on the computer. Upon confirmation that the paper copy was imaged and indexed, then the paper copy is destroyed. ; Microform: Any images on microfiche are to be retained one year after the expiration of the license and then the microfiche is destroyed. ; Electronic: Images on the computer are to be retained one year after the expiration of the license and then the images on the computer are to be destroyed., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Erase ; Electronic: Erase
